results.title: Consulate General of India in Shanghai hosts International Day of Yoga at Bund Finance Centre
results.description: Shanghai's historic Bund was the vibrant setting for India's 12th International Day of Yoga celebration. Over 400 attendees, including diplomats and diaspora members, embraced the "Yoga for Healthy Ageing" theme. Consul General Pratik Mathur highlighted the event's significance, marking the culmination of 90 days of yoga-focused activities across China, underscoring the enduring Indo-China connection.

results.title: HD Kumaraswamy dismisses rift with BJP over cross-voting in Karnataka Council polls
results.description: HDK dismisses rift with BJP over cross-voting in Council polls

results.title: Meitei insurgent group member arrested in Goa
results.description: Police said that two insurgents were arrested by Manipur police on June 5 in a UAPA case for alleged extortion, and during disclosures, they revealed that they had been working in close coordination with the accused.

results.title: ‘Horrible’: Backlash Erupts as NBC Abruptly Delays U.S. Open Coverage for Celebrity Host
results.description: Weekends during major championships are reserved for in-depth golf coverage as fans stick to their screens for the same reason. But NBC Sports’ Saturday coverage at the U.S. Open found a difficult hiccup. As Wyndham Clark’s lead carried into moving day at Shinnecock Hills, the broadcast pulled away from the live tournament for an interview [...] The post ‘Horrible’: Backlash Erupts as NBC Abruptly Delays U.S. Open Coverage for Celebrity Host appeared first on CBNC .

results.title: Why did Nancy Pelosi's net worth drop $8 million? Inside the former House speaker's fortune
results.description: Nancy Pelosi lost $8 million in 2025, but one major investment kept her fortune from falling even further.
